recommendations.title: Le Divorce
recommendations.overview: While visiting her sister in Paris, a young woman finds romance and learns her brother-in-law is a philanderer.

recommendations.title: The Remains of the Day
recommendations.overview: A rule-bound head butler's world of manners and decorum in the household he maintains is tested by the arrival of a housekeeper who falls in love with him in post-WWI Britain. The possibility of romance and his master's cultivation of ties with the N

recommendations.title: Surviving Picasso
recommendations.overview: The passionate Merchant-Ivory drama tells the story of Francoise Gilot, the only lover of Pablo Picasso who was strong enough to withstand his ferocious cruelty and move on with her life.

recommendations.title: A Room with a View
recommendations.overview: When Lucy Honeychurch and chaperon Charlotte Bartlett find themselves in Florence with rooms without views, fellow guests Mr Emerson and son George step in to remedy the situation. Meeting the Emersons could change Lucy's life forever but, once back

recommendations.title: Howards End
recommendations.overview: A saga of class relations and changing times in an Edwardian England on the brink of modernity, the film centers on liberal Margaret Schlegel, who, along with her sister Helen, becomes involved with two couples: wealthy, conservative industrialist He

recommendations.title: Stuck in Love
recommendations.overview: An acclaimed writer, his ex-wife, and their teenaged children come to terms with the complexities of love in all its forms over the course of one tumultuous year.

recommendations.title: El Camino: A Breaking Bad Movie
recommendations.overview: In the wake of his dramatic escape from captivity, Jesse Pinkman must come to terms with his past in order to forge some kind of future.

recommendations.title: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic ex-football player drinks his days away, having failed to come to terms with his sexuality and his real feelings for his football buddy who died after an ambiguous accident. His wife is crucified by her desperation to make him desire her

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Young Hearts
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old Elias increasingly feels like an outsider in his village. When he meets his new neighbour of the same age, Alexander, Elias is confronted with his burgeoning sexuality.
